name: Joint Mobility Warm-Up
description: 5-10 minutes. Use video or your own dynamic warm up to prepare joints and muscles for exercise.

name: Bodyweight Squats
description: 3 sets of 8-10 reps. Sit back, heels down, knees open, squat low, hold onto counter as needed. Rest 30-45 seconds between sets.

name: Modified Push-Up
description: 3 sets of 8-10 reps. Use a counter or piece of sturdy furniture for an elevated push-up. Rest 30-45 seconds between sets.

name: Door Frame Row
description: 3 sets of 8-10 reps. Squeeze shoulder blades together, stop if grip starts to fatigue. Rest 30-45 seconds between sets.

name: Split Squat
description: 3 sets of 6-8 reps per leg. Back straight, hold on for balance if needed. Rest 20-30 seconds between sets.

name: Penguin Crunch
description: 3 sets of 15 reps per side. Tuck chin slightly, tap heels alternating sides. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Glute Bridge
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Lift hips up all the way, squeeze glutes at the top. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Plank
description: 2-3 sets, hold for 20-45 seconds each. Hold plank on elbows, keep body in a straight line. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Bird Dog
description: 2-3 sets of 10 reps per side. Keep hips and shoulders square, extend opposite arm and leg. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Push-Ups
description: 4 sets of 8-10 reps. Lower chest to ground, keep body straight. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Table Row
description: 4 sets of 8-10 reps. Only perform on sturdy table. If not sturdy, use door frame row. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Backward Lunge
description: 3 sets of 10 reps per leg. Back straight, alternate each rep. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Sit-Up
description: 3 sets of 15-20 reps. Curl up, don't hinge at the hips. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Single Leg Deadlift
description: 3 sets of 8-10 reps per leg. Keep back straight, hinge at hips. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Up/Down Plank
description: 2-3 sets of 8-10 reps. Keep hips and shoulders square, move from elbows to hands and back. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Back Extension
description: 2-3 sets of 10-12 reps. Lengthen as you lift, squeeze lower back and glutes. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Jump Squats
description: 4 sets of 8 reps. Land softly, make each jump count, don't go too fast. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Feet Elevated Push-Ups
description: 4 sets of 8-10 reps. Lower chest to ground with feet elevated on sturdy surface. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Single Leg Squat
description: 3 sets of 3-8 reps per leg. Hold on for balance as needed, keep heel flat. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: V-Up
description: 3 sets of 8-10 reps. Keep hips tucked under, lift torso and legs simultaneously to form V shape. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Single Leg Elevated Glute Bridge
description: 3 sets of 8-10 reps per leg. Lift hips to full extension with one foot elevated. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Reverse Crunches
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Lift with abs, don't swing, bring knees toward chest. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Rotating Side Plank
description: 3 sets of 45-60 seconds. Keep core straight, rotate from side plank to front plank. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Triceps Dip
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Go as low as comfortable, keep back close to chair. Rest 30-45 seconds between sets.

name: Elevated Feet Triceps Dip
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Elevate feet on chair, go as low as comfortable. Rest 30-45 seconds between sets.

name: Tabletop Extension
description: 2-3 sets of 10 reps per side. Lift hips to full height from tabletop position. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: One-Arm Push-Up
description: 3 sets of 3-5 reps per side. Follow progression in video, keep body stable. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Side Lying Crunches
description: 3 sets of 15 reps per side. Use just the oblique, crunch sideways. Rest 15-30 seconds between sets.

name: Bench Press (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 8-12 reps. Adjust seat so handles are even with chest, press away without locking elbows. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Bench Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Adjust Functional Training Arms to chest height, press away from chest. Can be performed one arm at a time. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Converging Bench Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Arms converge to the middle as you press. Adjust arms to chest height. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Incline Bench Press (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 8-12 reps. Adjust seat back to incline position, handles even with chest, press upward at angle. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Converging Incline Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Press upward at 45-degree angle while bringing hands together. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Decline Bench Press (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 8-12 reps. Adjust seat back to shoulder position, lean back, press away without locking elbows. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Decline Bench Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Press away from chest parallel to the floor while leaning back. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Converging Decline Bench Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Press parallel to floor while converging to the middle. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Self Stabilizing Chest Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Sit forward without back support, use much lower weight. Core stabilizers engaged. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Pec Fly
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Arms in widest position, bring together in circular motion. Can be done one arm at a time. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Incline Fly
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Bring arms together and upward in circular motion. Can be done one arm at a time. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Low Fly
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Bring arms up and together to chest height from low position. Return slowly. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Shoulder Press (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 8-12 reps. Adjust seat so handles are at shoulder height, press overhead without locking elbows. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Shoulder Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Adjust arms to vertical position, press arms overhead. Can be done one arm at a time. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Converging Shoulder Press
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Bring arms together during the overhead press. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Keep arms straight, raise hands outward and upward. Can be done one arm at a time. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Front Raise
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Keep arms straight, raise hands forward and upward. Can be done one arm at a time. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Standing Cable Lateral Raise
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per arm. Stand next to machine, raise arm outward and upward. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Standing Front Raise
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Use chain on low pulley, raise bar forward and upward to chest height. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Upright Row
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Use chain on low pulley, pull bar upward to shoulder level. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: External Rotator
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per arm. Rotate arm away from midsection like opening a door. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Internal Rotator
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per arm. Rotate arm toward midsection like closing a door. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Wide overhand grip, pull straight down to upper chest. Can use underhand or narrow grip. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Low Cable Row
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Sit on floor facing low pulley, pull to midsection, squeeze shoulder blades. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Mid Row (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Pull back as far as possible, squeeze shoulder blades together. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: One Arm Row
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps per arm. Bend at waist, pull to midsection with neutral grip. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Front Lat Pullover
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Keep arms straight, pull bar down from high pulley. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Seated Cable Mid Row
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Lean back slightly, pull back as far as possible, keep upper torso stationary. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Self Stabilizing Mid Row
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Stand in front of machine without back support, pull bar back. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Arm Curl
description: 3 sets of 12 reps. Keep elbows stationary, curl handles upward. Can vary grip and width. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Standing Bar Curl
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Use chain on low pulley, curl bar upward keeping elbows stationary. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Overhead Biceps Curl
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Curl straight bar behind head from high pulley, keep upper arm stationary. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Arm Curl From Mid Pulley
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Sit facing back of machine, pull from mid pulley toward face while leaning back. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Triceps Pushdown
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Push bar downward, flexing at elbow, use full range of motion. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Triceps Extension (Mid Pulley)
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Hold upper arm horizontal, extend lower arm at elbow. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Triceps Extension From High Pulley
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps. Lean slightly forward, hold upper arm horizontal, extend at elbow. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Triceps Kickback
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per arm. Bend at waist, lock upper arm at side, extend at elbow. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Ab Crunch (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 15-20 reps. Use ab strap over shoulders, crunch forward and downward using abs. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Reverse Crunch (Seated Knee Raise)
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Extend legs to horizontal, draw knees toward chest. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Oblique Twist (Cable)
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per side. Lock hips, twist upper torso. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Side Bends (Cable)
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per side. Lock hips, bend upper torso to opposite side. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Leg Extension (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps. Align knees with pivot point, extend legs to horizontal. Can do one leg at a time. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Standing Leg Curl
description: 3 sets of 12 reps per leg. Bend knee backward and upward, use one leg at a time. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Seated Leg Curl
description: 3 sets of 12 reps. Bend at knee pushing roller pads down, point toes for hamstring focus. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Leg Press (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 10-15 reps. Place feet on foot plates, press outward to full extension without locking knees. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Calf Raise (Machine)
description: 3 sets of 15-20 reps. Push outward flexing at ankle, do not lock knees. Angle feet to target different areas. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Hip Adduction
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per leg. Pull leg toward and across support leg using full range of motion. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Hip Abduction
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per leg. Pull leg outward away from support leg using full range of motion. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Glute Kick
description: 3 sets of 12-15 reps per leg. Pelvis tilted forward, extend hip and pull leg backward. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Golf Swing (Cable)
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps per side. Assume golf stance, swing as if swinging a club. Vary arm height for different emphasis. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Tennis Swing (Cable)
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps per side. Assume tennis backhand or forehand stance, swing as if hitting ball. Vary arm height. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Baseball Pitch (Cable)
description: 3 sets of 10-12 reps per side. Stand in front of machine, throw as if throwing a baseball. Use high pulley for downward emphasis. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Hollow Body Hold
description: 3 sets, hold for 20-40 seconds each. Lie on back, arms overhead, legs straight. Lift shoulders and legs off floor, creating a banana shape. Rest 30 seconds between sets.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: 3 sets of 8-12 reps. Kneel with ab wheel at knees, roll forward extending body, then pull back using core. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Dragon Flag
description: 3 sets of 5-8 reps. Lie on bench, grip behind head. Lift entire body off bench keeping it rigid, lower with control. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Pallof Press
description: 3 sets of 12 reps per side. Stand sideways to cable at chest height, press arms straight out resisting rotation. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Turkish Get-Up
description: 3 sets of 3-5 reps per side. Lie with weight overhead, rise to standing through steps keeping weight stable. Rest 90 seconds between sets.

name: L-Sit
description: 3 sets, hold for 10-30 seconds each. Sit on floor or dip bars, press hands down, lift legs straight out forming an L. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Cable Woodchop
description: 3 sets of 12 reps per side. Stand sideways to cable machine, pull handle diagonally across body from high to low or reverse. Rest 45 seconds between sets.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: 3 sets of 10-15 reps. Hang from pull-up bar, raise legs to 90 degrees or toes to bar using core control. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: High Knees
description: 3 rounds of 30 seconds. Run in place driving knees above hip height, pump arms. Rest 30 seconds between rounds.

name: Butt Kicks
description: 3 rounds of 45 seconds. Run in place kicking heels toward glutes with quick turnover. Rest 30 seconds between rounds.

name: Box Jumps
description: 3 sets of 10 reps. Stand facing plyo box, squat and jump onto box landing softly, step down. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Battle Ropes
description: 3 rounds of 30 seconds. Hold rope ends, alternate whipping waves up and down explosively. Rest 30 seconds between rounds.

name: Sled Push
description: 3 sets of 20-30 meters. Load sled with weight, drive forward pushing through legs with arms extended. Rest 90 seconds between sets.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: 3 sets of 15-20 reps. Hinge at hips, swing weight to chest height using hip snap not arms. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

name: Rowing Machine Sprint
description: 4-6 rounds of 250m sprints at max effort. Set rower to damper 3-5. Rest 1 minute between rounds.

name: Assault Bike Sprint
description: 8-10 rounds of 20 seconds max effort. Pedal arms and legs simultaneously at max effort. Rest 40 seconds between rounds.

name: Steady-State Jogging
description: Maintain a comfortable conversational pace for 20-45 minutes. Keep cadence light, land mid-foot. Builds aerobic base and endurance.

name: Interval Sprinting
description: Sprint at 90-100% effort for 30 seconds, then walk or jog for 60-90 seconds to recover. Repeat 8-12 rounds. Maximizes calorie burn and speed.

name: Tempo Run
description: Run at a comfortably hard pace — faster than jogging, slower than sprinting — for 15-30 minutes. Sustains lactate threshold.

name: Hill Sprints
description: Sprint up a steep incline for 20-40 meters, walk down to recover. 6-10 rounds. Builds explosive power and leg strength.

name: Fartlek Run
description: Mix jogging, running, and sprinting at random intervals during a continuous run. Example: jog 5 min, run hard 2 min, sprint 30 sec, repeat.
